rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 3-Speed Hammer Drill with TOOL CONNECT (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on challenging construction applications with the 20V MAX* 3-Speed Hammer Drill with TOOL CONNECT. This Bluetooth-enabled product delivers efficient out-of-the-box compatibility to the TOOL CONNECT inventory management system. Track, manage, and control your tools within the DEWALT Control and Site Manager apps to simplify your inventory solution.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 1/2 in. 3-Speed Hammer Drill (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on a wide range of demanding applications with the 20V MAX* XR Brushless 1/2 in. 3-Speed Hammer Drill. Our most powerful 20V MAX* hammer drill** is equipped with the ANTI-ROTATION System that shuts the tool down if rotational motion is excessive and delivers up to 275 holes per charge†. Featuring an all-metal transmission construction to help withstand tough applications, this 3-speed hammer drill includes an adjustable 3-position LED to help illuminate dim work areas. Battery and charger sold separately.
features: Our Most Powerful 20V MAX* Hammer Drill** - Take on a wide range of demanding applications with our most powerful hammer drill**.

Help Maximize Control - Equipped with the ANTI-ROTATION System that senses the rotational motion of the tool and shuts it down if the motion is excessive. The red LED indicator illuminates when the ANTI-ROTATION System is engaged.
Advanced Maneuverability - Access and maneuver in tight areas with the shortest length DEWALT premium 3-speed drill††.
additional_features: 3-Speed High-Performance Transmission - Help optimize runtime and performance with an all metal transmission.
Illuminate Dim Areas - Brighten your workspace with the pivoting 3-position, push-button LED featuring a 20-minute work light setting.
Strong Bit Grip- Get high bit-retention with the 1/2 in. ratcheting nitro-carburized metal chuck with carbide inserts.
Prioritize Productivity - Make up to 275 holes per charge† and help minimize downtime.
Simplify Asset Management - Track and manage with the TOOL CONNECT CHIP READY system (chip sold separately) and the Site Manger app.
Part Of Our Best Performing Line Of 20V MAX* Power Tools - Innovative power tools designed to deliver certainty for the world's toughest pros.
includes: (1) DCD1007 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 1/2 in. 3-Speed Hammer Drill
disclaimers: *Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
**Based on rated maximum watts out for DEWALT 20V MAX* hammer drills currently on the market.
†Using DCB2108 battery and 7/8" diameter auger (sold separately) in 1‐1/2" thick fir.
††Tool head only vs. DCD999, DCD998, DCD997, DCD991 and DCD996 hammer drills

‡Based on MWO, using DCB2108 battery (sold separately) vs. Milwaukee 18V 2906-20 1/2in. hammer drill using 48-11-1880 battery. Milwaukee is a registered trademark of Milwaukee Electric Tool Corp., which has not endorsed or approved this comparison.

‡‡Based on application testing using DCB2108 battery (sold separately) vs. Milwaukee 18V 2906-20 1/2in. hammer drill using 48-11-1880 battery drilling 2-9/16" self feed bits into 1-1/2" thick fir. Milwaukee is a registered trademark of Milwaukee Electric Tool Corp., which has not endorsed or approved this comparison.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 1/2 in. 3-Speed Hammer Drill With LANYARD READY Attachment Point (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on a wide range of demanding applications with the 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 1/2 in. Hammer Drill. Our most powerful 20V MAX* hammer drill** is equipped with the ANTI-ROTATION System that shuts the tool down in bind-up situations and delivers up to 275 holes per charge†. Featuring an all-metal transmission construction to help withstand tough applications, this 3-speed hammer drill includes an adjustable 3-position LED to help illuminate dim work areas. LANYARD READY attachment point is designed for users to utilize a lanyard to tether the tool and battery to rigid structures on jobsites. When working at height only use LANYARD READY equipped batteries (sold separately). Battery and charger sold separately.
features: LANYARD READY attachment point is designed for users to utilize a lanyard to tether the tool and battery to rigid structures on jobsites. When working at height only use LANYARD READY equipped batteries (sold separately).

Up to 35% more power vs. Milwaukee‡

Compact design (10.3" length) allows for comfortable use and easy access to tight spaces
Lock On trigger gives the option to keep the drill running continuously when doing repetitive applications
applications: Ideal for installation and removal of Tapcon/Tapper fasteners
Optimal drilling applications in concrete from 3/16" to 3/8"
Maximum drilling applications in concrete of 3/8"
Drilling applications in wood up to 1 1/4"
Drilling applications in steel up to 1/2"
Ideal for small Spike/Redi-Drive and "nail-in" anchor systems in block, brick, and soft concrete
